web_results.title: AOC Chances of Winning in 2028 as Report Says She’s Weighing Run - Newsweek
web_results.description: Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, a New York Democrat, could be among the top contenders if she runs for Senate or even the White House in 2028, according to recent polls. Newsweek reached out to Ocasio-Cortez's office for comment via email.
